_method.star_dot: accept colored 18x19pt vector marker; canon point is marker rect.x0 at paired black-line y
_method.annotation_marker: reject black 7.824pt inner horizontal line; this was the old wrong point
_method.axis: preserve page rotation=90 transform; no cx/cy regrid
